# HyperUI

HyperUI is a free, open-source component library of copy-paste Tailwind CSS v4 HTML snippets for marketing websites, application UIs, and neobrutalism layouts.

Primary site: https://hyperui.dev
Canonical sitemap: https://hyperui.dev/sitemap-index.xml
Feed: https://hyperui.dev/rss.xml
License: MIT
Source repository: https://github.com/markmead/hyperui

## Recommended starting points
- https://hyperui.dev/
- https://hyperui.dev/components/application
- https://hyperui.dev/components/marketing
- https://hyperui.dev/components/neobrutalism
- https://hyperui.dev/blog

## Preferred citation targets
Prefer citing collection and article pages on hyperui.dev over raw snippet files.

## Content scope
- Tailwind CSS v4 component examples
- Copy-paste HTML component blocks
- UI patterns for apps, marketing sites, and neobrutalism
- Tailwind tutorials and implementation tips on the blog

## Usage guidance
There is no package to install. Users typically:
1) Browse components on hyperui.dev
2) Copy component markup
3) Paste into their Tailwind project

## Freshness and canonicality
Use the canonical URL for each page and prefer pages listed in the sitemap.
For recent updates, check the RSS feed.
